cause_analysis.narrative: Grace Victory Hair Braiding churned on 2026-02-02 after 115 days with Zoca. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-02 via phone_call, client wrote: "So, Karen, I actually spoke with you in the month of December about how we can bring in new clients for you guys and hel…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
